name: steam-blade-mcp
description: Steam gaming platform — library, achievements, friends, store data, market prices
author: groupthink-dev

setup.blurb: Steam gaming platform — library stats, achievements, friends, store data, and market prices.
setup.help_text: Get a Steam Web API key at steamcommunity.com/dev/apikey (requires a Steam account with purchase history). Find your Steam64 ID at steamid.io.

fields.label: Steam Web API Key
fields.help: Register at steamcommunity.com/dev/apikey (requires Steam purchase history)

fields.label: Steam ID (64-bit)
fields.help: Your 17-digit Steam ID. Find via steamid.io or your profile URL.

prerequisites: Steam account with at least one purchase

certification.security_notes: API key auth. Read-only. No write operations. Per-endpoint rate limiting.

notes: Steam Web API MCP with Storefront API for catalog search. API key auth (trivial setup). Covers player summaries, achievements, owned games, friends, presence, store data, market prices. Steam deprecated chat messaging — no gated operations.
